[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001000111 4
1 101100011 5
2 000111111 6
3 111101110 7
4 011111101 7
5 111011110 7
6 111111111 a
7 111111111 a
